title: CAMTemplate Object
description: Object that represents a template for a set of operations. These can be created from operations, optionally stored to files or in a library. The template can be used to re-create those operations in another document.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: createFromFile
methods.description: Create a CAMTemplate from a file on disk, i.e. Import the template file. Invalid files will produce errors

methods.name: createFromOperations
methods.description: Create a CAMTemplate from a list of Operations

methods.name: createFromXML
methods.description: Creates a CAMTemplate from an XML string. Invalid template XML will produce errors

methods.name: createHoleTemplateFromOperations
methods.description: Create a hole CAMTemplate from a list of hole operations. Hole templates may be used in Hole Recognition

methods.name: getHoleSignatureXML
methods.description: Convert hole signature to XML. This will be empty if this is not a hole template, or if there is no signature.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Save the CAMTemplate to a file

methods.name: setHoleSignatureXML
methods.description: Provide an XML snippet to specify a hole signature. This will have no effect if this is not a hole template. This will fail if the provided snippet is not valid.

properties.name: attributes
properties.description: Returns the collection of attributes associated with this template.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Gets and sets the description of the template.

properties.name: isHoleTemplate
properties.description: Whether or not this is a hole template

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Gets and sets the name of the template.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

attributes.title: CAMTemplate.attributes Property
attributes.description: Returns the collection of attributes associated with this template.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = cAMTemplate_var.attributes

description.title: CAMTemplate.description Property
description.description: Gets and sets the description of the template.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = cAMTemplate_var.description

# Set the value of the property.
cAMTemplate_var.description = propertyValue

isHoleTemplate.title: CAMTemplate.isHoleTemplate Property
isHoleTemplate.description: Whether or not this is a hole template

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = cAMTemplate_var.isHoleTemplate

isValid.title: CAMTemplate.isValid Property
isValid.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = cAMTemplate_var.isValid

name.title: CAMTemplate.name Property
name.description: Gets and sets the name of the template.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = cAMTemplate_var.name

# Set the value of the property.
cAMTemplate_var.name = propertyValue

objectType.title: CAMTemplate.objectType Property
objectType.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object. It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = cAMTemplate_var.objectType

# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = cAMTemplate_var.operations

# Set the value of the property.
cAMTemplate_var.operations = propertyValue

classType.title: CAMTemplate.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

createFromFile.title: CAMTemplate.createFromFile Method
createFromFile.description: Create a CAMTemplate from a file on disk, i.e. Import the template file. Invalid files will produce errors

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The path to a template file.

createFromOperations.title: CAMTemplate.createFromOperations Method
createFromOperations.description: Create a CAMTemplate from a list of Operations

parameters.name: operations
parameters.description: An array of operations to bundle into a template.

createFromXML.title: CAMTemplate.createFromXML Method
createFromXML.description: Creates a CAMTemplate from an XML string. Invalid template XML will produce errors

parameters.name: xml
parameters.description: The XML representation to act as a base for creating a template.

createHoleTemplateFromOperations.title: CAMTemplate.createHoleTemplateFromOperations Method
createHoleTemplateFromOperations.description: Create a hole CAMTemplate from a list of hole operations. Hole templates may be used in Hole Recognition

parameters.name: operations
parameters.description: A list of operations to bundle into a template. Only 2D Adaptive, 2D Chamfer, 2D Contour, 2D Pocket, Bore, Circular, Drill and Thread operations are allowed in hole templates. Passing in other operation types will throw an error.

getHoleSignatureXML.title: CAMTemplate.getHoleSignatureXML Method
getHoleSignatureXML.description: Convert hole signature to XML. This will be empty if this is not a hole template, or if there is no signature.

save.title: CAMTemplate.save Method
save.description: Save the CAMTemplate to a file
save.return_description: Returns true if the template was saved successfully, false otherwise.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The path to the file you wish to save

setHoleSignatureXML.title: CAMTemplate.setHoleSignatureXML Method
setHoleSignatureXML.description: Provide an XML snippet to specify a hole signature. This will have no effect if this is not a hole template. This will fail if the provided snippet is not valid.
setHoleSignatureXML.return_description: This will return true on success, false on failure.
